### Pre-Sleep Routines
Establishing a calming environment is key to optimal sleep hygiene. Turn off screens one hour before bed to reduce blue light exposure. Try deep breathing exercises to lower stress levels immediately.

### Diet Adjustments
Late carbohydrates can degrade sleep hygiene quality throughout the night. Limit caffeine intake to no later than two hours before resting. Drink water consistently during the day but taper off in the evening.

### Recommended Apps
You can enhance your strategy by downloading tools that improve sleep hygiene. Try Sleep Cycle or Calm for guided meditation and tracking. Keep a log of your dreams to analyze subconscious patterns weekly.<|im_end|>

final_answer:
### Pre-Sleep Routines
Establishing a calming environment is key to optimal sleep hygiene. Turn off screens one hour before bed to reduce blue light exposure. Try deep breathing exercises to lower stress levels immediately.

### Diet Adjustments
Late carbohydrates can degrade sleep hygiene quality throughout the night. Limit caffeine intake to no later than two hours before resting. Drink water consistently during the day but taper off in the evening.

### Recommended Apps
You can enhance your strategy by downloading tools that improve sleep hygiene. Try Sleep Cycle or Calm for guided meditation and tracking. Keep a log of your dreams to analyze subconscious patterns weekly.<|im_end|>
